code: import React from'react';import{Tabs,Tab,Box}from'@mui/material';import{Link,useLocation}from'react-router-dom';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Navigation(){const location=useLocation();const getCurrentTab=()=>{switch(location.pathname){case'/issuer':return 1;case'/verifier':return 2;case'/wallet':return 3;case'/enhanced':return 4;case'/admin':case'/admin/passport':case'/admin/csca':case'/admin/pkd':case'/admin/trust-anchor':case'/admin/metrics':return 5;default:return 0;}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Box,{sx:{borderBottom:1,borderColor:'divider',mb:3},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Tabs,{value:getCurrentTab(),"aria-label":"demo navigation",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Tab,{label:"Home",component:Link,to:"/"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Tab,{label:"Issuer",component:Link,to:"/issuer"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Tab,{label:"Verifier",component:Link,to:"/verifier"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Tab,{label:"Wallet",component:Link,to:"/wallet"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Tab,{label:"Enhanced",component:Link,to:"/enhanced"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Tab,{label:"Admin",component:Link,to:"/admin"})]})});}export default Navigation;
